properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v6 v7 v3 v6 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: With hands lifted high I know You've heard my cry For mercy Jesus, Son of God Your love goes on and on And finds me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Glory undefined Unmeasured and divine I worship I worship You and You alone Majestic on the throne Of heaven Of heaven

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hear the mountains tremble Our God is strong and able Your kingdom coming down Your kingdom coming down Merciful and mighty For love, You left the ninety-nine Savior to the lost and blind Savior to me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: With hands lifted high I know You've heard my cry For mercy, for mercy Jesus, Son of God Your love goes on and on And finds me Oh, and finds me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: As the thunder starts to roll I'll hold to what I know That You are my high tower Fortress in dark hours That Your promises are true And I no longer stand accused The Cross has crushed my shame

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Hallelujah I'll shout it loud Hallelujah I'll sing about Your love, Your love, Your love Your love, Your love, Your love
